name: Western Union
description_short: Cleveland's Western Union at 3050 W 117th St offers money transfer and check cashing services daily 8AM-8PM.
description_long:
Western Union at 3050 W 117th St in Cleveland, OH is a standalone check-cashing store open 7 days a week. The location at this West 117th Street address operates daily from 8AM to 8PM, making it accessible for morning and evening transactions. This Cleveland branch provides convenient access to money transfer and check-cashing services for residents throughout the area.

This Western Union location in Cleveland offers domestic and international money transfers, check cashing, and bill payment services. Customers can call +1 216-941-5012 to confirm service availability, ask about fees, or get directions. The staff can assist with transfer options for sending money domestically or internationally.

When visiting Western Union on West 117th Street in Cleveland, bring a valid government-issued ID to cash checks or send transfers. Popular times to avoid lines include early morning or late afternoon. Western Union provides essential financial services for residents who need quick money transfers or check cashing without a traditional bank account.
pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ verified locations across the US at major retailers
24/7 online money sending available, with in-store payment options based on agent hours
Multiple payment methods and delivery options including cash pickup and card transfer
Multilingual support in six languages (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese)
Established loyalty program (Western Union Rewards) and referral incentives
Specialized services including mobile top-ups, inmate payments, and bill pay options
Real-time transfer tracking and price estimation tools available online
cons: Pricing and exchange rates not disclosed on publicly available pages, making cost comparison difficult
Service availability dependent on third-party retail partner hours, not dedicated Western Union locations
No specific APR or fee structure information available on location-finder pages
Limited transparency about competitive rates compared to newer digital money transfer competitors
Technical issues noted (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable at time of review)
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional bank accounts
International money senders needing reliable cash pickup at physical locations
Customers preferring established, recognizable brands with extensive retail presence
Non-English speakers in communities with multilingual support availability
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers needing reliable, widely-accessible money transfer services through established retail locations, particularly those without bank accounts or those sending money internationally. The main caveat is that specific pricing, fees, and competitive rate information are not transparently displayed on their public-facing location pages, requiring customers to contact agents directly or visit the main site for cost details.
services: Transfer tracking and real-time status updates
Multiple payment methods and delivery options
meta_description: Cleveland Western Union at 3050 W 117th St, OH – check cashing and money transfers, 8AM-8PM.
